summaries.title: PM2 v7 env_file directive does not load .env — env vars must be in env block
summaries.summary: PM2 v7's `env_file` directive does not load .env file contents into the process environment; environment variables must be placed directly in the `env` block of `ecosystem.config.js`. Additionally, `pm2 restart` reuses the old environment, so you must use `pm2 delete` and `pm2 start` to apply new variables.
